ObjectStates.Name: BlockSquare
ObjectStates.LuaScript:
autoHideSwitch = 0

btparams1 = {
    click_function = "getSelectingOrder",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "회색 순서 결정",
    position       = {0, 1, -0.15},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1400,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "회색 플레이어들 중 순서를 정합니다.",
}
btparams2 = {
    click_function = "getColorOrder",
    function_owner = self,
    label          = "색상 순서 결정",
    position       = {0, 1, 0.15},
    rotation       = {0, 0, 0},
    width          = 1400,
    height         = 330,
    font_size      = 180,
    scale          = {0.3, 0.3, 0.3},
    color          = {1, 1, 1},
    font_color     = {0, 0, 0},
    tooltip        = "색상 플레이어들 중 순서를 정합니다.",
}

function onLoad()
    math.randomseed(os.time())
    self.createButton(btparams1)
    self.createButton(btparams2)
end

function getSelectingOrder(obj, color, alt)
    if alt == true then
        return
    end

    local greymen = {}
    local nickname = {}
    local nName = 0
    local nicknameOrdered = {}
    local nOrdered = 1
    local rv = 0
    local listToBroadcast = ""
    
    greymen = Player.getSpectators()
    nName = #greymen
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        nickname[i] = greymen[i].steam_name
    end
    
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        rv = math.random(1, nName)
        nicknameOrdered[nOrdered] = '['..nickname[rv]..']'
        nOrdered = nOrdered + 1
        nickname[rv] = nickname[nName]
        nName = nName - 1
    end
    for i = 1, #greymen do
        listToBroadcast = listToBroadcast..nicknameOrdered[i].."\n"
    end
    broadcastToAll('회색 플레이어('..tostring(#greymen).."명) 중 순서를 정합니다. - 채팅창 확인!")
    printToAll(listToBroadcast.."----------------------------------")
end

colorValue = {}
colorValue['White'] = {1, 1, 1}
colorValue['Brown'] = {0.443, 0.231, 0.09}
colorValue['Red'] = {0.856, 0.1, 0.094}
colorValue['Orange'] = {0.956, 0.392, 0.113}
colorValue['Yellow'] = {0.905, 0.898, 0.172}
colorValue['Green'] = {0.192, 0.701, 0.168}
colorValue['Teal'] = {0.129, 0.694, 0.607}
colorValue['Blue'] = {0.118, 0.53, 1}
colorValue['Purple'] = {0.627, 0.125, 0.941}
colorValue['Pink'] = {0.96, 0.439, 0.807}

function getColorOrder(obj, color, alt)
    if alt == true then
        return
    end

    local colorList = {'White', 'Brown', 'Red', 'Orange', 'Yellow', 'Green', 'Teal', 'Blue', 'Purple', 'Pink'}
    local seatedColor = {}
    local nColor = 0
    local rv = 0
    local pName

    for i = 1, 10 do
        if Player[colorList[i]].seated == true then
            nColor = nColor + 1
            seatedColor[nColor] = colorList[i]
        end
    end

    broadcastToAll("색상 플레이어("..tostring(nColor).."명) 중 순서를 정합니다. - 채팅창 확인!")
    
    while nColor > 0 do
        rv = math.random(1, nColor)
        if Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name ~= nil and Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name ~= '' then
            pName = Player[seatedColor[rv]].steam_name
        else
            pName = seatedColor[rv]
        end
        
        printToAll('['..pName..']', colorValue[seatedColor[rv]])
        seatedColor[rv] = seatedColor[nColor]
        nColor = nColor - 1
    end
    printToAll("----------------------------------")
end
ObjectStates.XmlUI:
<Panel active="true" width="1000" height="1000" visibility="Black"
    rectAlignment="MiddleCenter" offsetXY="0 0" scale="0.1 0.1 1" position="0 0 -51" rotation="0 0 180">
    <Text color="#000000" width="180" height="80" offsetXY="-10 0" fontSize="70" rectAlignment="UpperRight">v1.1</Text>
    <!-- <Button onClick="getSelectingOrder" width="750" height="240" offsetXY="0 150" fontSize="100">회색 순서 결정</Button>
    <Button onClick="getColorOrder" width="750" height="240" offsetXY="0 -150" fontSize="100">색상 순서 결정</Button> -->
</Panel>
